name: Squava
author: AGP
description: Squava, a 5x5 misère/positive hybrid n-in-a-row. Players alternately place a stone on an empty cell (no movement). Making FOUR or more in a row (horizontal, vertical, or diagonal) WINS immediately; but making exactly THREE in a row — when it is not part of a four — LOSES immediately. Four takes precedence over three. A full board with no decisive line is a draw.
